title: tetrastylis ovalis
intro: Tetrastylis ovalis, also known as the Ovalis or White Coral Tree, is a plant species native to tropical regions of the Pacific Islands, characterized by its white, fragrant flowers and shiny green leaves. Traditionally, Tetrastylis ovalis has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate various health issues such as fever, skin infections, and digestive problems. The health benefits associated with Tetrastylis ovalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable herb in natural remedies. Tetrastylis ovalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine and modern herbalism.
